system.description: Your body and blood have been upgraded. You heal quicker, tire slower, can perform feats of physical strength and endurance, and have active control of your body's systems.

upgrades.name: Reflex Boost
upgrades.description: You always act first in any initiative order.

upgrades.name: Speed Boost
upgrades.description: All your actions gain: Special: Take an extra move. You can't be attacked during this move.

upgrades.name: Horsepower
upgrades.description: You can move twice as fast or far as normal.

upgrades.name: Regeneration (Defensive)
upgrades.description: Heal 1 Health per round. Fully heal between combats.

upgrades.name: Resurrection Protocol
upgrades.description: If you die, roll a Con pool at the end of the combat with: Special: Return to life.
